logAction(string,string).notice: Log an agent action (e.g., analysis, swap) on-chain for verifiability.

registerAgent(string,string,bool).notice: Register a new AI agent with its iNFT token.

togglePrivacy(bool).notice: Toggle privacy mode for the calling agent.
